comment:
in the full app, clicking on the freezer symbol should change the ui state to freezer preview: see the prototype (blue tint for the ui, frozen conversation loaded, no composer, as the conversation is frozen
clicking on one of the scoops should change the ui state to scoop preview: see the prototype, too (ui tint matching the scoop's color, conversation thread matching the scoop's history, no composer as the conversation is driven by the cone) the shader primary color should match the scoop color (and this would use the 'swirl' type of shader
